subject: [PATCH v4 08/14] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT plumbing

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to userfaultfd, allowing userspace to track read-write protection (RWP) on memory ranges. It introduces two new ioctls: UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT, which enable RWP tracking and installation/removal of RWP on registered ranges. The patch also adds a capability bit UFFD_FEATURE_RWP and config option CONFIG_USERFAULTFD_RWP. The feature is not yet advertised in the API, but will be exposed in a follow-up patch.
